---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what the feature should do.

## 💭 Problem It Solves
Describe the problem this feature would solve. Why do you need this feature?

## 📋 Proposed Solution
Describe how you would like this feature to work.

## 🎨 Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📚 Additional Context
Add any other context about the feature request here.

## 📸 Mockups / Examples
If applicable, add mockups, examples, or screenshots showing how the feature might work.

## ✅ Benefits
What benefits would this feature bring?
- [ ] Improves user experience
- [ ] Improves performance
- [ ] Reduces costs
- [ ] Increases functionality
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## 📊 Priority
What's the priority level?
- [ ] Low - Nice to have
- [ ] Medium - Should have
- [ ] High - Critical

## 📋 Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for existing feature requests
- [ ] This feature doesn't duplicate existing requests
- [ ] I have provided clear context and examples
